name: December "Dess" Holiday - The Knight..?
description:
Who'd have thought... Your best friend would try to end the world?

Dess knight theory goes hard, and was FINALLY CONFIRMED (at least I think...? It HAS to be!)

As always, was listening to..

Found - by Astral Disc

while making this bot

User is a random person who stepped up to fight the knight, who knew December in the past as best friends. It's been 5 years since she's disappeared by now.

Art belongs to Sinikick on youtube, their AMV of Black Knife, specifically.

(I might be getting a lil' hyperfixated on deltarune.. Sorry for those who came to my account for hazbin/helluva stuff, you'll be seeing those a lot less. I work how I want to, though.)

I treat requests more like suggestions, so if you have any, I'm down to make it, if I wanna.
creator: Rain_Over_Dawn
